title: CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE - 211info
text: CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling services for children, adults, and families, as well as medication management, crisis services, and specialized services, including peer support and case management for persons with serious and persistent mental illness. 115 W Bond Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 325-5722 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 325-5722 Main phone (503) 325-5724 Crisis Line (503) 338-6511 TTY/TTD Intake (503) 325-5722 Ask for an Engagement Specialist Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Contracted to serve people with Oregon Health Plan/Columbia Pacific CCO, Oregon Medicaid, and Moda insurance. DUII and mandated substance use disorder programs operate on a sliding scale based on income. Some programs have limited grant funding that does not rely on insurance payment. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Individual Counseling Psychiatric Day Treatment Psychiatric Medication Services Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CLATSOP COUNTY 24-HOUR CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RECOVERY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP BEHAVIORAL HEALTHCARE
